questions.question: Impersonal passive: “{a1} he lives abroad.”
Formal reporting: “{a1} the painting is original.”
News style: “{a1} the storm is approaching.”
Use “It is thought that” to report an opinion without naming the {a1}.

“She {a1} know the truth” is the subject form.
